requirement_topic.en: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 Safety Evidence — Georgia GEOSTM / GNERC Framework for Solar PV Inverters
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 安全证据——格鲁吉亚GEOSTM / GNERC太阳能光伏逆变器框架
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 安全證據——喬治亞GEOSTM / GNERC太陽能光伏逆變器框架

summary.en: Georgia's standards body GEOSTM (Georgian National Agency for Standards and Metrology) adopts IEC and EN standards as Georgian national standards under the country's DCFTA EU-alignment programme. The applicable safety standards for solar PV inverters in Georgia are IEC 62109-1 (Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements) and IEC 62109-2 (Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters). These are the globally recognised safety standards for PV inverters and are adopted by GEOSTM under IEC alignment. Third-party type-test evidence from an ILAC-accredited laboratory demonstrating compliance with IEC 62109-1/-2 is the expected basis for GEOSTM conformity assessment and GNERC/GSE grid-connection technical approval. China's primary voluntary safety standard GB/T 37408 is not harmonised with IEC 62109 and is not accepted by GEOSTM or Georgian grid operators as equivalent to IEC 62109 type-test evidence.
summary.zh: 格鲁吉亚标准化机构GEOSTM（格鲁吉亚国家标准和计量局）在该国DCFTA欧盟对接计划下将IEC和EN标准采纳为格鲁吉亚国家标准。格鲁吉亚太阳能光伏逆变器适用的安全标准为IEC 62109-1（光伏电力系统用功率变换器安全——第1部分：通用要求）和IEC 62109-2（第2部分：逆变器特殊要求）。这些是全球公认的光伏逆变器安全标准，已由GEOSTM在IEC对接框架下采纳。来自ILAC认可实验室、证明符合IEC 62109-1/-2的第三方型式试验证据是GEOSTM合格评定和GNERC/GSE并网技术审批的预期依据。中国主要自愿性安全标准GB/T 37408未与IEC 62109协调，不被GEOSTM或格鲁吉亚电网运营商接受为IEC 62109型式试验证据的等效依据。
summary.zht: 喬治亞標準化機構GEOSTM（喬治亞國家標準和計量局）在該國DCFTA歐盟對接計畫下將IEC和EN標準採納為喬治亞國家標準。喬治亞太陽能光伏逆變器適用的安全標準為IEC 62109-1（光伏電力系統用功率轉換器安全——第1部分：通用要求）和IEC 62109-2（第2部分：逆變器特殊要求）。這些是全球公認的光伏逆變器安全標準，已由GEOSTM在IEC對接框架下採納。來自ILAC認可實驗室、證明符合IEC 62109-1/-2的第三方型式試驗證據是GEOSTM合格評定和GNERC/GSE併網技術審批的預期依據。中國主要自願性安全標準GB/T 37408未與IEC 62109協調，不被GEOSTM或喬治亞電網運營商接受為IEC 62109型式試驗證據的等效依據。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62109-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters (adopted by GEOSTM under IEC/EN alignment)
IEC 62109-1 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements (parent standard, implicitly applicable)
GEOSTM — Georgian National Agency for Standards and Metrology — IEC/EN adoption under DCFTA
GNERC / GSE grid-connection technical conditions referencing applicable IEC safety standards

summary.en: China's primary voluntary standard for PV grid-connected inverter safety is GB/T 37408-2021 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters), which covers classification, environmental conditions, safety, electrical performance, EMC, and markings. GB/T 37408 is a Chinese domestic standard assessed by CNAS-accredited Chinese laboratories. It shares conceptual safety intent with IEC 62109-1/-2 but is not harmonised with IEC 62109 and is not accepted by GEOSTM or Georgian grid operators (GNERC, GSE, Telasi, Energo-Pro Georgia) as equivalent to IEC 62109 type-test evidence. There is no EAC/TR CU route for Georgia — Georgia is not an EAEU member and Russian-market or EAEU-market certification does not apply.
summary.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器安全的主要自愿性标准为GB/T 37408-2021（光伏并网逆变器技术要求），涵盖分类、环境条件、安全、电气性能、EMC和标识。GB/T 37408是由中国CNAS认可实验室评估的中国国内标准。其安全意图与IEC 62109-1/-2在概念层面相近，但未与IEC 62109协调，不被GEOSTM或格鲁吉亚电网运营商（GNERC、GSE、Telasi、Energo-Pro Georgia）接受为IEC 62109型式试验证据的等效依据。格鲁吉亚没有EAC/TR CU路径——格鲁吉亚不是EAEU成员，俄罗斯市场或EAEU市场认证不适用。
summary.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器安全的主要自願性標準為GB/T 37408-2021（光伏並網逆變器技術要求），涵蓋分類、環境條件、安全、電氣性能、EMC和標識。GB/T 37408是由中國CNAS認可實驗室評估的中國國內標準。其安全意圖與IEC 62109-1/-2在概念層面相近，但未與IEC 62109協調，不被GEOSTM或喬治亞電網運營商（GNERC、GSE、Telasi、Energo-Pro Georgia）接受為IEC 62109型式試驗證據的等效依據。喬治亞沒有EAC/TR CU路徑——喬治亞不是EAEU成員，俄羅斯市場或EAEU市場認證不適用。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Chinese GB/T 37408 safety certification does not satisfy Georgia GEOSTM IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test requirements for conformity assessment or grid-connection approval. Exporters must obtain IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test certificates from an ILAC-accredited laboratory covering the specific inverter model or family being supplied to the Georgia project. Existing Chinese safety certificates based solely on GB/T 37408 must be supplemented with IEC 62109-1/-2 test reports before submitting equipment documentation for GEOSTM conformity assessment, GNERC review, or GSE/distribution operator technical approval. Do NOT present EAC/TR CU certificates as the compliance route — they have no standing in Georgia.
gap.zh: 中国GB/T 37408安全认证不满足格鲁吉亚GEOSTM合格评定或并网审批的IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验要求。出口商须从ILAC认可实验室取得涵盖供应至格鲁吉亚项目的特定逆变器型号或系列的IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验证书。仅依据GB/T 37408的现有中国安全证书，在提交GEOSTM合格评定、GNERC审查或GSE/配电运营商技术审批所需设备文件前，须补充IEC 62109-1/-2测试报告。切勿将EAC/TR CU证书作为合规路径提交——其在格鲁吉亚不具法律效力。
gap.zht: 中國GB/T 37408安全認證不滿足喬治亞GEOSTM合格評定或併網審批的IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗要求。出口商須從ILAC認可實驗室取得涵蓋供應至喬治亞項目的特定逆變器型號或系列的IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗證書。僅依據GB/T 37408的現有中國安全證書，在提交GEOSTM合格評定、GNERC審查或GSE/配電運營商技術審批所需設備文件前，須補充IEC 62109-1/-2測試報告。切勿將EAC/TR CU證書作為合規路徑提交——其在喬治亞不具法律效力。

mandatory_status.target: Expected mandatory under GEOSTM IEC/EN alignment for conformity assessment of PV inverters; IEC 62109-1/-2 are the applicable safety standards — verify current GEOSTM conformity assessment scope and mandatory product list directly with GEOSTM
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary — GB/T 37408-2021 is a recommended national standard (GB/T designation); CQC/CGC voluntary certification available but not required under Chinese law; EAC/TR CU certification not applicable to Georgia

source.publisher: GEOSTM (Georgian National Agency for Standards and Metrology)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A solar PV inverter holding only Chinese GB/T 37408 certification cannot satisfy Georgia GEOSTM IEC 62109-1/-2 conformity requirements. Plan for IEC 62109-1/-2 type testing by an ILAC-accredited laboratory before submitting equipment documentation for GEOSTM conformity assessment or GNERC/GSE grid-connection review. Verify current GEOSTM conformity assessment procedures and mandatory product scope directly at geostm.gov.ge. Georgia is not an EAEU member — do not present EAC/TR CU certificates as a compliance route.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 仅持有中国GB/T 37408认证的太阳能光伏逆变器不能满足格鲁吉亚GEOSTM的IEC 62109-1/-2合格评定要求。请在提交GEOSTM合格评定或GNERC/GSE并网审查设备文件前，安排ILAC认可实验室进行IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验。请直接在geostm.gov.ge核实现行GEOSTM合格评定程序和强制性产品范围。格鲁吉亚不是EAEU成员——请勿将EAC/TR CU证书作为合规路径提交。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 僅持有中國GB/T 37408認證的太陽能光伏逆變器不能滿足喬治亞GEOSTM的IEC 62109-1/-2合格評定要求。請在提交GEOSTM合格評定或GNERC/GSE併網審查設備文件前，安排ILAC認可實驗室進行IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗。請直接在geostm.gov.ge核實現行GEOSTM合格評定程序和強制性產品範圍。喬治亞不是EAEU成員——請勿將EAC/TR CU證書作為合規路徑提交。
